'''âm-n-y''' ('''kamanay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:magnificate|magnificate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:magnificate|magnificate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-n-y
|-
! Lemma
| kamanay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimanay|thimanay]] || [[word:jimanay|jimanay]] || [[word:shimanay|shimanay]] || [[word:kimanay|kimanay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumanay|thuthumanay]] || [[word:jujumanay|jujumanay]] || [[word:shushumanay|shushumanay]] || [[word:kukumanay|kukumanay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumanay|thumanay]] || [[word:jumanay|jumanay]] || [[word:shumanay|shumanay]] || [[word:kumanay|kumanay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumanay|thumanay]] || [[word:jumanay|jumanay]] || [[word:shumanay|shumanay]] || [[word:kumanay|kumanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themanay|themanay]] || [[word:jemanay|jemanay]] || [[word:shemanay|shemanay]] || [[word:kemanay|kemanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomanay|thothomanay]] || [[word:jojomanay|jojomanay]] || [[word:shoshomanay|shoshomanay]] || [[word:kokomanay|kokomanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomanay|thomanay]] || [[word:jomanay|jomanay]] || [[word:shomanay|shomanay]] || [[word:komanay|komanay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomanay|thomanay]] || [[word:jomanay|jomanay]] || [[word:shomanay|shomanay]] || [[word:komanay|komanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmanay|thĂŠmanay]] || [[word:jĂŠmanay|jĂŠmanay]] || [[word:shĂŠmanay|shĂŠmanay]] || [[word:kĂŠmanay|kĂŠmanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamanay|thathamanay]] || [[word:jajamanay|jajamanay]] || [[word:shashamanay|shashamanay]] || [[word:kakamanay|kakamanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamanay|thamanay]] || [[word:jamanay|jamanay]] || [[word:shamanay|shamanay]] || [[word:kamanay|kamanay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamanay|thamanay]] || [[word:jamanay|jamanay]] || [[word:shamanay|shamanay]] || [[word:kamanay|kamanay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamanay|shamanay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamanay|goshamanay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamanay|gokishamanay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamanaynĂŒ|shamanaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamanaynknĂŒ|goshamanaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamanaynĂŒ|gokishamanaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamanayshĂ«|shamanayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamanaynkshĂ«|goshamanaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamanayshĂ«|gokishamanayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamanayro|shamanayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanaynkro|goshamanaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamanayro|gokishamanayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamanaymu|shamanaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanaynkmu|goshamanaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamanaymu|gokishamanaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamanaysher|shamanaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamanaynksher|goshamanaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamanaysher|gokishamanaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamanayng|shamanayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamanaynkng|goshamanaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamanayng|gokishamanayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamanaya|shamanaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamanaynkya|goshamanaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamanaya|gokishamanaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamanayam|shamanayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamanaynkyam|goshamanaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamanayam|gokishamanayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamanaynĂŒshĂ«|shamanaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamanaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshamanaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamanaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishamanaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamanaynĂŒro|shamanaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanaynknĂŒro|goshamanaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamanaynĂŒro|gokishamanaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamanaynĂŒmu|shamanaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanaynknĂŒmu|goshamanaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamanaynĂŒmu|gokishamanaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamanayshĂ«nĂŒ|shamanayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamanaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamanaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamanayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamanayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamanayshĂ«ro|shamanayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanaynkshĂ«ro|goshamanaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamanayshĂ«ro|gokishamanayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamanayshĂ«mu|shamanayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanaynkshĂ«mu|goshamanaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamanayshĂ«mu|gokishamanayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamanayronĂŒ|shamanayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamanaynkronĂŒ|goshamanaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamanayronĂŒ|gokishamanayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamanayroshĂ«|shamanayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamanaynkroshĂ«|goshamanaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamanayroshĂ«|gokishamanayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamanayromu|shamanayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanaynkromu|goshamanaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamanayromu|gokishamanayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamanaymunĂŒ|shamanaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamanaynkmunĂŒ|goshamanaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamanaymunĂŒ|gokishamanaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamanaymushĂ«|shamanaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamanaynkmushĂ«|goshamanaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamanaymushĂ«|gokishamanaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamanaymuro|shamanaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanaynkmuro|goshamanaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamanaymuro|gokishamanaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
